title: WSKAZÓWKI DOTYCZĄCE SKUTECZNEGO KORZYSTANIA ZE ŚLUZY HIGIENICZNEJ NA FERMIE DROBIU
description: A guide offering key recommendations for effective use and design of hygienic sluices on poultry farms, aimed at preventing pathogen introduction and enhancing biosecurity. It outlines zoning strategies, sanitation procedures, and organizational measures to ensure hygienic compliance and operational efficiency.
